featureName: E2E Testing Infrastructure + Document Upload & Intervention Validation
description: Mise en place d'une infrastructure de tests E2E fonctionnelle avec Puppeteer + Vitest, correction des bugs critiques d'upload multi-lot, et validation end-to-end des flows de creation d'immeubles/lots avec documents et interventions. Focus sur tests locaux (localhost:3000).

userStories.title: Fix login auth helper for client-side redirect pattern
userStories.description: As a test runner, I want the Puppeteer login helper to handle SEIDO's client-side redirect pattern (useActionState + window.location.href with 100ms delay) so that E2E tests can authenticate successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: Auth helper uses waitForFunction instead of waitForNavigation to detect post-login redirect
Login waits for URL to no longer contain /auth/login (max 15s timeout)
Error messages from login form are properly captured if login fails
Smoke test 'should login as gestionnaire' passes against local dev server
Lint passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: Validate smoke tests pass against local dev server
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 5 smoke tests passing against localhost:3000 so that the E2E infrastructure is proven functional before writing more complex tests.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 smoke tests pass: login page loads, login as gestionnaire, dashboard display, building creation page, lot creation page
Tests run via npm run test:e2e with dev server running on localhost:3000
Screenshots are saved on failure for debugging
Lint passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: E2E test: Building creation wizard (5-step flow)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a full E2E test that navigates the 5-step building creation wizard (Info > Lots > Contacts & Documents > Interventions > Confirmation) to validate the flow works end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Test navigates to /gestionnaire/biens/immeubles/nouveau
Step 1: Fills building info (name, address, type)
Step 2: Adds at least 1 lot
Step 3: Contacts & Documents step loads correctly
Step 4: Intervention step loads with templates
Step 5: Confirmation step displays summary
Test completes without errors
Lint passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: E2E test: Lot creation wizard (independent lot mode)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a full E2E test for the lot creation wizard in independent-lot mode to validate the flow including document upload staging and intervention selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Test navigates to /gestionnaire/biens/lots/nouveau
Selects 'lot independant' mode
Fills lot info (name, address, type)
Documents step loads with document slots
Intervention step loads with lot-specific templates
Confirmation step displays summary
Test completes without errors
Lint passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: E2E test: Document upload validation during creation
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to verify that document upload staging works correctly during building/lot creation — files are staged in memory and the UI reflects pending uploads.
acceptanceCriteria: Test stages a document file in the building creation wizard (step 3)
Staged file appears in the document checklist UI with pending status
Document slots are correctly displayed per entity type
Test validates the multi-lot document upload hook sends correct snake_case fields (lot_id, team_id, document_type)
Lint passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: E2E test: Intervention selection during creation
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to verify that intervention templates are correctly displayed and selectable during building/lot creation, and that scheduling options work.
acceptanceCriteria: Test navigates to intervention step in building creation wizard
Building intervention templates are displayed (6 templates)
Can toggle intervention selection on/off
Scheduling options are displayed for selected interventions
Contact assignment selector is available
Lint passes (npm run lint)
